name: Anaplan Connected Planning Cloud REST API
what_it_does: Anaplan connected planning cloud REST API for finance, supply chain, sales, and HR teams at enterprise organizations to build, run, and integrate multi-dimensional planning models — enabling automated data integration, model exports, action triggering, and planning workflow automation through Anaplan's cloud-native connected planning platform serving 2,200+ enterprise customers. Enables AI agents to manage model for Anaplan workspace and model navigation automation, handle data import for planning model data loading automation, access data export for planning result and report data extraction automation, retrieve action for model calculation and workflow trigger automation, manage list for planning dimension and hierarchy management automation, handle process for multi-step planning workflow execution automation, access version for planning version and scenario management automation, retrieve mapping for data source field mapping automation, manage user for Anaplan user and role management automation, and integrate Anaplan with ERP, CRM, HCM, and data warehouse systems for enterprise connected planning automation.
use_cases: Automating data integration from ERP into Anaplan financial planning models for FP&A automation agents
Triggering Anaplan model calculations and processes for period-end planning cycle automation agents
Extracting planning results and scenarios from Anaplan for reporting and analytics automation agents
Managing Anaplan list hierarchies for planning dimension updates from source systems automation agents
not_for: Operational transactional systems (Anaplan is planning, not ERP or operational transaction processing)
Small business budgeting (Anaplan is enterprise connected planning for complex multi-dimensional models)
Real-time operational analytics (Anaplan is planning cycles, not real-time dashboarding)
best_when: An enterprise finance, supply chain, or HR team wanting AI agents to automate data integration, trigger model calculations, extract planning results, and manage planning workflows through Anaplan's connected planning platform.
avoid_when: ANAPLAN MODEL ARCHITECTURE IS COMPLEX: Anaplan models have custom dimensions, line items, and hierarchies; automated generic planning assumption creates model_not_found for customer-specific configurations; automated must understand each customer's Anaplan model architecture. BULK OPERATIONS USE ASYNC JOBS: Anaplan data imports and exports use async job processing; automated synchronous data loading assumption creates job_in_progress; automated must submit job, poll for completion, and retrieve results. DATA INTEGRATION IS ONE-WAY BY DEFAULT: Anaplan API integration is primarily for data IN (import) and data OUT (export); automated bidirectional real-time sync assumption creates Anaplan-as-operational-DB anti-pattern; automated must treat Anaplan as planning system, not operational database. PRODUCTION MODEL CHANGES REQUIRE CHANGE MANAGEMENT: Anaplan model changes (new line items, dimensions) require development and testing; automated production model modification assumption creates model_corruption risk; automated must implement proper Anaplan model change management.

auth.notes: Anaplan uses Basic Auth (certificate) + OAuth2 for REST API. REST API with JSON. San Francisco, CA HQ. Founded 2006 by Guy Haddleton. Acquired by Thoma Bravo (PE) 2022. Products: Financial planning, supply chain planning, workforce planning, sales performance management, connected data hub. SDKs: Python, Java Anaplan Connect. 2,200+ enterprise customers. Hyper-block technology. Competes with Adaptive Insights and Oracle EPM for enterprise planning.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox for implementation partners; production requires enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per workspace and user; module-based licensing; implementation services
pricing.notes: San Francisco CA. Thoma Bravo PE. Annual subscription. 2,200+ enterprises. Connected planning leader.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API token; bulk import and export jobs throttled per workspace tier

known_agent_gotchas: WORKSPACE AND MODEL HIERARCHY: Anaplan API uses workspace → model → module → view hierarchy; automated flat-API assumption creates missing context for nested model navigation; automated must understand and traverse Anaplan's workspace/model structure

BULK IMPORTS ARE JOB-BASED: Data imports use async job pattern (submit → poll → retrieve log); automated synchronous import assumption creates job_pending indefinitely; automated must implement job polling with configurable timeout and retry

IMPORT MAPPINGS MUST PRE-EXIST: Anaplan import actions require pre-configured import mappings; automated new-mapping-via-API assumption creates mapping_not_found; automated must pre-configure import actions in Anaplan before API-driven data loading

LARGE EXPORTS REQUIRE STREAMING: Large Anaplan exports use chunked streaming; automated single-response export assumption creates memory_overflow for large models; automated must implement chunked export reading for large planning model exports

CERTIFICATE AUTH IS ALTERNATIVE: Anaplan supports certificate-based auth as alternative to OAuth2 for server-to-server; automated OAuth2-only assumption may miss certificate auth option; automated should evaluate certificate auth for long-running integration processes
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise planning. SOC2, ISO-27001, GDPR. OAuth2/cert. US/EU. Financial and workforce planning data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Connected planning. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Financial planning and scenario data.
